codeReview.summary: Final quality scan verification task completed successfully. The worker ran desloppify scan, tests, lint, and build. Strict quality score improved from baseline 74.8 to 83.3 (+8.5 points). All verification criteria met.

summary: Verification-only task. Desloppify scan shows strict score improved from 74.8 to 83.3 (+8.5 points). All tests pass, lint passes, build succeeds, overall coverage 47.9%. The commit a116d53 added 1192 lines of server test coverage (server coverage increased from 25.4% to 52.5%). No code issues found.
